{'name': 'ProfileContextSwitchFlow', 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/ProfileController.cs', 'method': 'SetActiveProfile', 'line': 94, 'verified': True, 'steps': ['1. User selects profile in UI → calls POST /api/profile/setactiveprofile?profileId=X', '2. ProfileController.SetActiveProfile(): IProfileService.CanUserAccessProfile(profileId, userId) checked', '3. If false → HTTP 403 ForbidWithMessage', '4. If true → Profile loaded via GetProfileById(profileId)', '5. _workContext.CurrentProfile = profile (sets User.CurrentProfileId in DB)', '6. Next RefreshAccessToken call propagates new ProfileId into JWT', '7. All subsequent requests use new ProfileId']}

{'name': 'ProfileCreationFlow', 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Profiles/ProfileService.cs', 'method': 'InsertProfile', 'line': 207, 'verified': True, 'steps': ['1. Admin POSTs profile creation form', '2. Validate required fields: Name, ProfileTypeId, CustomerId, CountryId', '3. InsertProfile(profile) → INSERT into Profiles', '4. If initial roles provided: AddProfileRoleMappings(profileId, roleIds)', '5. If initial users provided: AddProfileAccessToUsers(profileId, userIds)', '6. Optionally assign to ProfileRoleGroup: AddRoleGroupToProfile(groupId, profileId)']}

{'name': 'ProfileRoleCapabilityCheckFlow', 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Permissions/PermissionService.cs', 'method': 'DoesProfileHaveRole', 'line': 206, 'verified': True, 'steps': ['1. Feature service called (e.g. send SMS, use eBoks, access maps)', '2. DoesProfileHaveRole(currentUser.ProfileId, ProfileRoleNames.CanSendByEboks) called', '3. IPermissionService checks ProfileRoleMappings JOIN ProfileRoles (cached)', '4. If false → throw NotAllowedException or return HTTP 403', '5. If true → proceed with feature operation'], 'notes': 'DoesProfileHaveRole is the PRIMARY feature gate across the entire system.'}

{'name': 'ProfileSoftDeleteFlow', 'file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Profiles/ProfileService.cs', 'method': 'DeleteProfile', 'line': 147, 'verified': True, 'steps': ['1.
